demo_fitness.tagline: Fitness that fits your life, not the other way around
demo_fitness.what_they_do: PeakForm is a boutique fitness studio offering personal training, group classes, and nutrition coaching. We work with busy professionals, beginners who feel intimidated by gyms, and athletes looking to break plateaus.

products_services.name: 1:1 Personal Training
products_services.description: Dedicated trainer, fully customized program, flexible scheduling. Results guaranteed in 90 days.
products_services.best_for: People who want accountability and a plan built around their schedule

products_services.name: Group HIIT Classes
products_services.description: High-energy 45-minute classes, 6am–8pm daily. Beginner-friendly modifications always available.
products_services.best_for: People who want energy and community without the commitment of personal training

products_services.name: Nutrition Coaching
products_services.description: 12-week guided program with weekly check-ins. Real habits, not meal plans.
products_services.best_for: People who exercise but can't crack the nutrition side

products_services.name: Recovery & Mobility Sessions
products_services.description: 60-minute guided stretching and recovery. Open to non-members.
products_services.best_for: Athletes, desk workers with chronic tightness, injury recovery

key_benefits: No long-term contracts — month to month
Free 30-minute intro session for every new member
Results guarantee — or your money back in 90 days
demo_fitness.owner_context: Most customers come to us because they've tried gyms before and quit. Top reasons: no accountability, didn't know what to do, felt judged. Our most common question is 'I haven't worked out in years, is this right for me?' Answer is always yes. Most popular service is 1:1 training. Second most common: people who want to lose weight but don't know where to start with food.

visitor_questions.journey_framing: Tell us a little about where you're starting from — we'll show you exactly what fits.

questions.text: How would you describe your fitness right now?
questions.purpose: Identifies starting point and likely service fit
options: Complete beginner — haven't worked out in a while
I exercise occasionally but inconsistently
I'm active but stuck or plateaued
Returning after injury or health issue

questions.text: What's the main thing you're hoping to change?
questions.purpose: Identifies primary goal to match service recommendation
options: Lose weight and feel better in my body
Build strength and real fitness
Fix my eating habits — exercise isn't the issue
Recover and move without pain

questions.text: What's held you back from getting results before? (be honest — no judgment here)
questions.purpose: Identifies psychological barrier to personalize the message

demo_saas.tagline: Close deals faster with less admin
demo_saas.what_they_do: Flowdesk is a CRM and sales automation platform for small and mid-size businesses. We replace spreadsheets and missed follow-ups with one system that runs your pipeline automatically.

products_services.name: Flowdesk Starter
products_services.description: Full CRM for solo users. Contact management, pipeline tracking, email sequences. $29/month.
products_services.best_for: Freelancers and solopreneurs who need to stop losing track of leads

products_services.name: Flowdesk Team
products_services.description: Everything in Starter plus team pipeline views, shared inbox, and deal collaboration. $49/user/month.
products_services.best_for: Small sales teams who need visibility without complexity

products_services.name: Flowdesk Automate
products_services.description: AI-powered follow-up sequences, lead scoring, and meeting booking — runs 24/7.
products_services.best_for: Teams who want to automate the repetitive parts of sales

products_services.name: Done-For-You Setup
products_services.description: Our team migrates your data, builds your pipeline, and trains your team in one week.
products_services.best_for: Teams switching from Salesforce or HubSpot

key_benefits: Average customer closes 31% more deals in 90 days
demo_saas.owner_context: Most people come to us because they're drowning in spreadsheets or fed up with Salesforce being too complex. Top question: 'How long does it take to set up?' (answer: 30 mins). Second most common: 'Can it replace HubSpot?' Most popular plan is Team. Most common customer profile: founder or sales lead at a 5-15 person company who is personally doing sales and needs to scale without hiring.

visitor_questions.journey_framing: Two minutes to understand your situation — then we'll show you exactly how Flowdesk fits.

questions.text: How are you managing your sales pipeline right now?
questions.purpose: Identifies pain point and switching intent
options: Spreadsheets — it's getting messy
Another CRM (Salesforce, HubSpot, etc.)
Nothing formal — it's all in my head or email
I have a system but it doesn't work well

questions.text: What's the biggest sales problem you need to solve?
questions.purpose: Identifies primary use case for product recommendation
options: I'm losing track of leads and follow-ups
My team has no visibility into the pipeline
I spend too much time on manual tasks
I need to close faster and more consistently

questions.text: How big is your sales team, and what are you trying to achieve in the next 90 days?
questions.purpose: Qualifies team size and urgency for plan recommendation

demo_agency.tagline: Brand and design for businesses that mean something
demo_agency.what_they_do: Kindred Creative is a boutique brand and design agency working with purpose-driven small businesses, nonprofits, and founders. We do brand strategy, visual identity, websites, and content.
target_customers: Small businesses ready for a rebrand

products_services.name: Brand Foundation
products_services.description: 3-week brand strategy and identity sprint. Positioning, voice, logo system, and a brand guide.
products_services.best_for: Businesses launching or rebranding who need a clear, consistent identity

products_services.name: Website Design & Build
products_services.description: Custom Webflow or Squarespace website. Strategy-first, SEO-ready, editable by your team after launch.
products_services.best_for: Businesses whose website no longer reflects who they are

products_services.name: Content & Copywriting
products_services.description: Website copy, brand story, email sequences, pitch decks. Written in your voice.
products_services.best_for: Founders who know what they want to say but can't make it land

products_services.name: Brand Refresh
products_services.description: Update your existing brand — refine logo, update colors and fonts, modernize without losing brand equity.
products_services.best_for: Established businesses that have outgrown their current look

key_benefits: You own everything — all files, all source docs
Free 45-minute brand clarity call before any commitment
demo_agency.cta_primary: Book a free brand clarity call
demo_agency.owner_context: Most clients come to us because they feel embarrassed sending people to their website, or their brand doesn't match the quality of their work. Most common question: 'How long does a rebrand take?' (3-6 weeks for brand, 6-8 for website). Top service: Brand Foundation first, then website. Most common client: solo founder or small team who has been in business 2-5 years and outgrown their DIY brand.

visitor_questions.journey_framing: Help us understand where you are — we'll show you the fastest path to a brand that actually works.

questions.purpose: Identifies brand maturity and likely service fit
options: I'm launching something new — starting from scratch
I have a brand but I've outgrown it
My brand is fine but my website is the problem
I need help putting my ideas into words

questions.text: What's the moment that made you look for help?
questions.purpose: Identifies emotional trigger to personalize the message
options: I felt embarrassed sending someone to my website
A big opportunity is coming and I'm not ready
My brand doesn't reflect the quality of my work
I'm rebranding after a pivot or growth

questions.text: Tell us about your business and what you're trying to communicate — in your own words.
questions.purpose: Open context for highly personalized page generation
